title: Bookings calendar
subtitle: Reserved space for a visual arrivals / in-house / departures calendar for this property.
body1: In this version, the calendar is intentionally read-only and not yet wired to live data.
body2: You can continue using the Stays view and Ops board for day-to-day planning. Once your bookings calendar is ready, this page can show a grid of dates and rooms with simple colour codes.
